records.problem_summary: Salesforce slow loading in Chicago office
records.resolution: Known CDN issue in US Midwest; resolved after 4 hours without user action

records.problem_summary: VPN disconnects every 15 minutes for remote workers
records.resolution: Gateway maintenance caused drops; resolved after maintenance window

records.problem_summary: Okta lockout after failed MFA attempts
records.resolution: IT Helpdesk reset MFA binding and unlocked account

records.problem_summary: Jenkins pipeline timeouts after maintenance window
records.resolution: Data Platform fixed network ACLs; pipelines restored next day

records.problem_summary: Snowflake prod access request for new hire
records.resolution: Manager approval obtained; Data Platform provisioned read-only role
